; 16 columns x 12 rows
; 0-3 = ground height
; X = block
; . = ground height 0
; slope tile format: 1N 1NE 2E 2SE 3S 2SW 1W 3NW
; slope rule: hDIR means slope from height (h-1) up to height h

0000 0001 1111 1100
0000 0011 1222 2110
0000 0111 1222 2110
0001 1111 1222 2110
0011 22X1 1111 1100
0112 2332 1110 0000
0112 23X2 1110 0000
0112 2332 1110 0000
0011 22X1 1111 1100
0001 1111 1222 2110
0000 0111 1222 2110
0000 0001 1111 1100
